option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
spring: datasource: url: jdbc:postgresql://localhost:5432/VCORE username: postgres password: 1234 hikari: connection-timeout: 30000 maximum-pool-size: 10
jpa: hibernate: ddl-auto: update open-in-view: false show-sql: true properties: hibernate: jdbc: lob: non_contextual_creation: true id: new_generator_mappings: true
# Email Configuration (Replace with actual credentials when deploying to production) mail: host: smtp.gmail.com port: 587 username: vexcorespng@gmail.com password: gxbn varb ihfu qadg properties: mail: smtp: auth: true starttls: enable: true
app: owner: email: vexcoresPNG@gmail.com

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
spring: datasource: url: jdbc:postgresql://localhost:5432/VCORE username: postgres password: 1234 hikari: connection-timeout: 30000 maximum-pool-size: 10
jpa: hibernate: ddl-auto: update open-in-view: false show-sql: true properties: hibernate: jdbc: lob: non_contextual_creation: true id: new_generator_mappings: true
# Email Configuration (Replace with actual credentials when deploying to production) mail: host: smtp.gmail.com port: 587 username: vexplate89@gmail.com password: your_app_password properties: mail: smtp: auth: true starttls: enable: true
server: error: include-message: always include-binding-errors: always include-stacktrace: always
app: owner: email: your_email@gmail.com
